⭐ OPEN 24 HOURS A DAY • 7 DAYS A WEEK • 365 DAYS A YEAR ⭐

WHAT WE'VE GOT

Everything you need, any time of day or night

🍬 Soda · Wine · Beer Cave · Snacks & More — All Inside!

⛽

Fuel

Regular, mid-grade & premium gasoline at great prices, anytime.

🍿

Snacks

Chips, candy, jerky & all your favorites stocked fresh daily.

☕

Drinks

Hot coffee, cold drinks, slushies & energy drinks 24 hrs.

🛒

Essentials

Household must-haves, ice, lottery & everything you need.

♿🚻

Restrooms

Always very clean & ADA accessible for all customers.

🔥

Propane

Swap your empty propane tank for a full one — fast & easy.

💨

Air Pump

Keep your tires properly inflated at our air pump station.

🏧

ATM

Convenient cash access available 24/7 inside the store.

🌎

Languages

We speak English & Spanish! Hablamos español.

⛽

FUEL

Regular, mid-grade & premium gasoline available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Always at great prices — stop by anytime!

🍿

SNACKS

Chips, candy, jerky, Hi-Chew & all your road trip favorites — stocked fresh so you never go hungry, day or night!

☕

DRINKS

Hot coffee, cold sodas, slushies, energy drinks, wine & our famous Beer Cave — ready 24 hours a day!

🛒

ESSENTIALS

Household must-haves, ice, lottery tickets & everything you forgot at the store — we've got you covered any hour!

♿🚻

RESTROOMS

Restrooms are always very clean and ADA Accessible.

Wheelchair-accessible restroom and onsite services for all customers.

🔥

PROPANE

Propane Exchange available here!

Swap your empty propane tank for a full one — fast and easy.

💨

AIR PUMP

Keep your tires properly inflated with our air pump station — available right here at Teddy's anytime!

🏧

ATM

Convenient cash access available 24/7 inside the store. Never get caught without cash!

🇺🇸🌎🇲🇽
LANGUAGES

We speak English & Spanish here at Teddy's!

Whether you prefer English or Spanish, our friendly staff is here to help you feel right at home. Everyone is welcome at Teddy's — no matter where you're from! ¡Hablamos español! Todos son bienvenidos en Teddy's. 🌟

🎵🎶🎵
SONGS
CANCIONES

🎵 We always have music playing at Teddy's Gas Station!

🎵 ¡Siempre tenemos música en Teddy's Gas Station!

🎶

Stop by and enjoy great tunes while you fuel up, grab a snack, or just hang out with us anytime.

¡Pasa y disfruta buena música mientras llenas el tanque, agarras una botana o simplemente te relajas con nosotros!

🔊

Whether it's hip hop, country, pop or oldies — we keep the vibes going all day and all night, 24/7!

Ya sea hip hop, country, pop o viejitas — ¡mantenemos el ambiente toda la noche y todo el día, 24/7!

🏠

Come in, turn up, and feel at home — Teddy's is more than just a gas station, it's a vibe!

Entra, súbele al volumen y siéntete en casa — ¡Teddy's es más que una gasolinera, es un ambiente!

🎤

Good music, good people, good prices — that's the Teddy's way!

Buena música, buena gente, buenos precios — ¡así es el estilo Teddy's!

🎵 Music makes everything better — see you at Teddy's! 🎵

🎵 ¡La música hace todo mejor — te vemos en Teddy's! 🎵
